nativeProps: HTML div attributes except owned children and change handling

enhancements.name: destination controls
enhancements.disabled: false removes destination labels, selects, and destination-change events while move buttons and keyboard movement remain

enhancements.name: move announcements
enhancements.disabled: false removes the live region and every announcement update

enhancements.name: undo
enhancements.disabled: false removes snapshots, Undo UI, callback events, and announcement output

enhancements.name: bounded virtual window
enhancements.disabled: false renders every item and removes spacers and window events
